title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 08 2022
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 08 2022
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 08 2022
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 08/03/2022
DCE iron ore futures open higher and go lower, the main contract closed 844.5, an increase only 0.36% throughout the day; The spotquotation in the morning quoted varied. some traders were active to sell, steel mills continue purchase on demand. Transaction price difference is larger, the overall market transaction atmosphere is general.
